context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements Process Table Functions with state management, timers, proper argument annotations, TTL configuration, and the correct SQL invocation syntax including uid and PARTITION BY.

checklist.name: Extends ProcessTableFunction
checklist.description: Both classes extend ProcessTableFunction<Row>, not ScalarFunction or TableFunction

checklist.name: SET_SEMANTIC_TABLE annotation
checklist.description: Input arguments use @ArgumentHint(SET_SEMANTIC_TABLE) for stateful partitioned processing

checklist.name: StateHint with TTL
checklist.description: TransactionVelocityTracker uses @StateHint with ttl annotation (e.g., ttl = "24h") on its state

checklist.name: ValueState for per-key state
checklist.description: Uses ValueState<T> (or MapView/ListView) as state parameters in the eval method

checklist.name: OnTimer annotation
checklist.description: SessionRevenueCalculator has an @OnTimer method for handling session timeout

checklist.name: Timer registration
checklist.description: Uses ctx.registerOnTime() to register timers for session expiration

checklist.name: FunctionHint output type
checklist.description: Both PTFs have @FunctionHint with @DataTypeHint specifying the output ROW schema

checklist.name: SQL PARTITION BY
checklist.description: SQL invocations use TABLE ... PARTITION BY user_id syntax for set-semantic processing

checklist.name: SQL uid parameter
checklist.description: SQL invocations include uid => 'some-identifier' for savepoint compatibility

checklist.name: SQL on_time DESCRIPTOR
checklist.description: SQL invocations include on_time => DESCRIPTOR(event_time) for event-time ordering

checklist.name: CAST for time parameter
checklist.description: Session timeout parameter passed as CAST(900000 AS BIGINT) or similar, not as INTERVAL (due to FLINK-37618)

checklist.name: Collect Row output
checklist.description: Both PTFs use collect(Row.of(...)) to emit output rows
